testsuite.name: com.a2acli.transport.HttpTransportTest

testcase.name: stream throws when called without a prior SSE response()
stream emits remaining SSE events after call()
call throws JsonRpcException for JSON-RPC error response()
call throws JsonRpcException for SSE error in first event()
call throws for unsupported content type()
call returns first SSE event as result()
call returns result for JSON response()

testsuite.system-err: SLF4J(I): Connected with provider of type [ch.qos.logback.classic.spi.LogbackServiceProvider]
